title: codereview: rpl_routing_lookup Yggdrasil TUN fallback lacks explicit prefix check in is_local_mesh
description: In gateway.rs:94 is_local_mesh relies on rpl.lookup_route or routes map. For 02xx::/7 Ygg addresses not in local RPL, it falls through to TUN but without explicit is_yggdrasil guard or classification per spec/05-routing.md. Could misroute if cache has overlapping entries. Update lookup_route or add classify in lichen-rpl::routing and use in gateway. File as codereview P2. Tests pass but logic incomplete.
